title: carex onoei subsp. capituliformis
intro: Carex onoei subsp. capituliformis is a subspecies of sedge, a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. In traditional herbal medicine, Carex onoei subsp. capituliformis is often prepared as a decoction or infusion to be used as a treatment for various ailments.
